name: Peanut Butter- Cinnamon Brownies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. In a medium bowl, combine melted butter and sugars.
Add eggs and vanilla; beat until smooth. In a small bowl, mix together flour, cinnamon, baking powder, and salt.
Add dry ingredients to the butter mixture; stir just until combined. Stir in peanut butter. Spread batter into a greased 7 x 11 inch metal baking pan.
Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until set in center. Yield: about 2 dozen brownies.
